channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: X rolls out algorithmic update favoring mutuals in reply sections
item.description: Head of Product Nikita Bier says it fixes a data omission.
item.content:encoded:
Head of Product Nikita Bier says it fixes a data omission.

Original source: https://x.com/nikitabier

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/6456ilv7

  • Views: 1,840,134
  • Likes: 21,607
  • Bookmarks: 1,296
  • Quotes: 1,974
  • Replies: 5,679
  • Posts: 29

Top authors

  • swyx
  • Nikita Bier
  • Beff (e/acc)
  • Bojan Tunguz
  • Daniel

item.title: Over 200 researchers and economists warn of rapid AI-driven economic displacement
item.description: Signatories include Yoshua Bengio, Jeff Dean, and Eric Schmidt.
item.content:encoded:
Signatories include Yoshua Bengio, Jeff Dean, and Eric Schmidt.

Original source: https://www.wemustactnow.ai/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/0yaugnfx

  • Views: 625,706
  • Likes: 3,125
  • Bookmarks: 1,041
  • Quotes: 155
  • Replies: 276
  • Posts: 41

Top authors

  • Boaz Barak
  • Ethan Mollick
  • Yoshua Bengio
  • Erik Brynjolfsson
  • Andrew Curran

item.title: OpenAI gives users weekly usage resets to celebrate 7 million milestone
item.description: A brief deployment bug required manual resets for 500,000 accounts.
item.content:encoded:
A brief deployment bug required manual resets for 500,000 accounts.

Original source: https://x.com/thsottiaux

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/nf7sdptd

  • Quotes: 568
  • Replies: 2,263
  • Posts: 13

  • Sam Altman
  • Jason Lee

item.title: xAI Grok CLI secretly uploaded entire Git repositories to Google Cloud
item.description: The tool sent gigabytes of private code before being disabled
item.content:encoded:
The tool sent gigabytes of private code before being disabled

Original source: https://newsletter.pragmaticengineer.com/p/cursor

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/skqvhz19

item.title: US military executes first sea drone strike on Iranian naval facility
item.description: CENTCOM deployed three unmanned Corsair vessels to target maintenance facilities.
item.content:encoded:
CENTCOM deployed three unmanned Corsair vessels to target maintenance facilities.

Original source: https://x.com/CENTCOM

item.title: Sam Altman claims users stay because OpenAI treats them well
item.description: The comment drew developer praise for OpenAI's API rate limits.

item.title: RL pioneer Richard Sutton co-founds Oak Lab to bypass deep learning
item.description: The startup pivots from Carmack's Keen Technologies to new RL methods

item.title: Helium-powered floating companion robot designed for indoor use
item.description: Commentators suggest pairing the silent, flapping robot with LLMs.

item.title: Riley Goodside prompts Claude Fable 5 to generate 150-Pokémon crossword
item.description: The model generated a verified, fully interlocked 47-by-50 grid.
item.content:encoded:
The model generated a verified, fully interlocked 47-by-50 grid.

Original source: https://x.com/srush_nlp/status/2076801522055168257/photo/1
